info.title: Musaium API
info.description: Active API surface for Musaium mobile backend (health, auth, chat, daily-art, reviews, admin, museum, support).

apiKeyAuth.description: B2B API key authentication. Pass the full API key as a Bearer token.

cookieAuth.name: access_token
cookieAuth.description: F7 (2026-04-30) — Web admin session cookie. HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Strict. State-changing requests authenticated via this cookie MUST also send the X-CSRF-Token header (double-submit, value bound to the access_token via HMAC-SHA256).

csrfToken.name: X-CSRF-Token
csrfToken.description: F7 — CSRF double-submit token. Required on POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE when the request authenticates via the access_token cookie. Value MUST equal the csrf_token cookie (which equals HMAC-SHA256(access_token, CSRF_SECRET)).

onboardingCompleted.description: Whether the user has completed the onboarding flow

ttsVoice.description: Spec C T2.4 — visitor's preferred TTS voice. `null` means inherit the env-level default.

mfaWarningDaysRemaining.description: R16 — present when an admin is inside the MFA warning window. Drives the enroll-now banner.

mfaSessionToken.description: Short-lived bearer used to call /auth/mfa/challenge or /auth/mfa/recovery.

redirectTo.description: Hint URL where the frontend should drive the user to start enrollment.

otpauthUrl.description: otpauth:// URI suitable for QR rendering.

manualSecret.description: Base32 secret for manual entry into authenticator apps.

remainingRecoveryCodes.description: Number of unused recovery codes left after this redemption.

intent.description: Session-level intent — drives prompt strategy and walk-mode UX.

CreateSessionRequest.description: Optional metadata attached to a new chat session. Every field is optional; the server derives defaults from the authenticated user and request headers.

locale.description: IETF BCP 47 locale tag (e.g. 'fr', 'en-US'). Falls back to Accept-Language.

suggestions.description: Optional suggestion chips returned only for chat sessions with intent='walk'.

images.description: Enriched images from external sources (Wikidata, Unsplash)

intent.description: Session-level intent — drives prompt strategy and walk-mode UX.

plaintext.description: The full API key — shown only once, never stored.

debugToken.description: Present in development only to simplify local testing.

UserDataExportPayload.description: GDPR Article 15 (right of access) + Article 20 (data portability) export. Saved artworks are mobile-only and intentionally absent.

savedArtworks.description: Always empty server-side: saved artworks live only in mobile local storage.

DescribeRequest.description: Describe request — either text or image is required

audio.description: Base64-encoded audio, present only when format=both

audioContentType.description: MIME type of the audio payload when format=both

enabled.description: true when conversation memory is enabled for the user

hits.description: Popularity score from cache ranking (cache entries only)

200.description: JWT session OR MFA challenge envelope. Inspect the discriminator fields (`accessToken` vs `mfaRequired`) before reading the body.

403.description: MFA enrollment deadline elapsed — no JWTs issued. Body shape: MfaEnrollmentRequiredResponse.

get.summary: Read the calling user's MFA enrollment state (F9 envelope).
get.description: Self-scoped read of the calling user's MFA status. Drives the Enable/Disable MFA UI without exposing the encrypted secret. RBAC: authenticated user only — req.user.id IS the user being read.

mfaEnrolled.description: True iff TOTP has been enrolled AND verified at least once.

methods.description: Active second-factor methods. Today only TOTP. Forward-compatible with WebAuthn / push.

lastVerifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 of the last successful TOTP / recovery verification. Null when MFA never verified.

post.summary: Start (or rotate) a TOTP enrollment for the authenticated user.

409.description: MFA is already enrolled — disable it first to re-enroll.

post.summary: Confirm a freshly enrolled TOTP secret with a 6-digit code.
Exchange mfaSessionToken + 6-digit TOTP code for a real JWT pair.
Exchange mfaSessionToken + recovery code for a JWT pair (consumes the code).

200.description: JWT session + remaining recovery code count.

post.summary: Disable MFA after re-confirming the user's password.

nonce.description: F3 (2026-04-30) — single-use OIDC nonce previously fetched via POST /api/auth/social-nonce. Optional during the rollout window (when OIDC_NONCE_ENFORCE=false on the backend); becomes required once enforcement flips on.

post.description: Mobile MUST call this immediately before invoking the native social SDK. Pass the returned nonce into Apple's `signInAsync({nonce})` (Apple SDK SHA-256-hashes it client-side) or Google One Tap / GoogleOneTapSignIn. The backend stores the nonce with a 5-minute TTL and consumes it atomically on the matching POST /api/auth/social-login.

200.description: Reset email sent (always succeeds to prevent enumeration)
Email change initiated; confirmation message sent to the new address

patch.summary: Update the authenticated user's preferred TTS voice

voice.description: OpenAI TTS voice id, or `null` to reset to the env-level default.

get.description: Returns the full personal-data dossier for the authenticated user (`req.user.id`, never a path/query parameter). Rate-limited to 1 export per user / 7 days; on 429 the response includes a `Retry-After` header.

get.summary: List API keys for the current user

post.summary: Post a text message and receive the assistant response as an SSE stream

200.description: SSE stream of token, guardrail, done, and error events

post.summary: Set or toggle feedback (thumbs up/down) on an assistant message

get.summary: List art keywords by locale, optionally filtered by creation date

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only return keywords created at or after this ISO timestamp

post.summary: Bulk upsert art keywords for guardrail enrichment
Create a review (stored as pending for moderation)

get.summary: Get average rating and approved review count

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back

get.summary: Content analytics (top artworks, museums, guardrail rate)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top items to return

get.summary: Paginated list of all support tickets (admin/moderator)

patch.summary: Update ticket status, priority, or assignment

get.summary: Search museums by location or text query

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Text search query (name filter or geocode input)

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Bounding box "minLng,minLat,maxLng,maxLat" (WGS84). When provided, takes precedence over lat/lng/radius — distance is measured from the bbox center.

200.description: Search results with distance and source

distance.description: Distance in meters from search origin

museumType.description: Museum category derived from OSM tags

openingHours.description: Raw OSM `opening_hours` tag (only when source=osm and tag is present)

description.description: OSM `description` tag (localized variant preferred when present)

get.summary: Get museum by ID or slug

post.summary: Submit a public support contact request
Add a message to a ticket
Generate standalone AI description from image or text

200.description: Description JSON (or binary audio when format=audio)

get.summary: Get current memory-opt-in preference for the authenticated user

patch.summary: Toggle memory opt-in preference for the authenticated user

enabled.description: true to enable conversation memory, false to disable it

get.summary: Offline low-data Q&A pack for a museum
get.description: Returns a merged list of popular cached LLM answers and seeded Q&A entries for offline use.

post.summary: Purge LLM cache entries for a museum (admin only)
